commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ae38a248bb40d2d06b60b5a4672c3d532334fb04)
commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies `extensions/telegram/src/send.ts` to catch selected `sendRichMessage` and rich edit failures and retry through legacy HTML send/edit paths.

PR surface: Source +46. Total +46 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the PR defects: the classifier catches unrelated rich 400s, the fallback retries the full chunk plan after possible partial success, and sibling rich paths remain raw. The original unsupported-rich production behavior still lacks live Telegram or version-pinned Bot API proof on this branch.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because contributor real-behavior proof is insufficient and the remaining blockers involve user-visible Telegram delivery semantics rather than a safe automated repair.
